# YieldGuard — yieldguard.ro

> YieldGuard is a Woma Ecoserv S.R.L. brand (CUI 14170608) specialized in utility-scale solar park maintenance in Romania: PV panel cleaning with RoboKleen equipment, vegetation and green space management, and Performance Ratio recovery.

## Pages
- Romanian (primary): https://www.yieldguard.ro/ro/
- English: https://www.yieldguard.ro/

## Services
- RoboKleen tracked PV panel cleaning with demineralized RO water
- Vegetation and land management for solar parks (HSE-compliant)
- National coverage across Romania for IPPs and institutional investors

## Contact
- Email: contact@yieldguard.ro
- Legal entity: Woma Ecoserv S.R.L., Romania
